channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Adrian Nocum Earns First PBA All-Star Selection After Impressive Rise with Rain or Shine
item.description: Adrian Nocum, a 26-year-old guard for the Rain or Shine Elasto Painters, has earned his first PBA All-Star appearance, marking a significant milestone in his young professional career. Drafted 24th ov...

item.title: Oil Prices Soar Amid Strait of Hormuz Closure and Middle East Conflict
item.description: Oil prices are surging dramatically as the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed to tankers due to ongoing military actions in the Middle East. This vital waterway, through which roughly a fifth...

item.title: Perceptions of Housework Division Vary Between Husbands and Wives
item.description: Research into household labour often shows divergent results depending on who is asked. A recent study analysed 24 years of data from the US Panel Study of Income Dynamics, focusing on married, dual-e...

item.title: BBC Persian Issues Correction After Mistranslating 'Regime' as 'People' in Pete Hegseth's Iran Speech
item.description: The British Broadcasting Corporation's Persian service made a significant translation error during a live broadcast of U.S. Secretary of War Pete Hegseth's recent speech on Iran. Hegseth referred to t...

item.title: Peter Obi Plans Legal Challenge Against Electoral Act 2026 Over Election Concerns
item.description: Former Anambra State Governor and ex-presidential candidate, Peter Obi, don yan say him dey plan take court action to challenge the Electoral Act 2026. Obi talk say some provisions for the law fit aff...

item.title: Casric Stars reach Nedbank Cup semifinals after defeating AmaZulu
item.description: Casric Stars have once again proven themselves as formidable opponents in the Nedbank Cup, extending their reputation for giant-killing. Following their shocking elimination of Orlando Pirates, the Kw...

item.title: Life EV Acquires Rad Power Bikes Following Bankruptcy Filing
item.description: Life Electric Vehicles Holdings (Life EV) has officially acquired Rad Power Bikes, including its intellectual property, inventory, and certain operating assets, for $13.2 million. Rad Power Bikes, a p...

item.title: PM Modi Criticises Trinamool Following President Murmu's Remarks on Political Conduct
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has strongly criticised West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee and the Trinamool Congress following remarks made by President Droupadi Murmu, calling certain actions '...

item.title: The Enduring Power of 'Women Without Men': Shahrnush Parsipur’s Feminist Novella in Context
item.description: Shahrnush Parsipur’s novella 'Women Without Men' (Zanan bedun-e Mardan) remains a seminal feminist work, defying decades of censorship in Iran. Published in 1989, it was promptly banned, and Parsipur ...

item.title: Gunfire at Three Toronto Synagogues Highlights Ongoing Antisemitism in Canada
item.description: In a disturbing escalation of antisemitic acts in Toronto, three synagogues—Temple Emanu-El, BAYT (Beth Avraham Yoseph of Toronto), and Shaarei Shomayim—were targeted by gunfire over the span of a wee...

item.title: Tanzania and Norway pledge continued cooperation in economic and social development
item.description: Dar es Salaam: Tanzania and Norway have reconfirmed their strong socio-economic and diplomatic relationship, emphasizing ongoing cooperation that benefits development across multiple sectors. Finance ...

item.title: Coco Martin and Julia Montes to Star in Upcoming ABS-CBN Primetime Series 'Sigabo' Premiering March 16
item.description: ABS-CBN Studios has announced a brand-new primetime teleserye titled 'Sigabo,' starring the much-loved pair Coco Martin and Julia Montes, popularly known as CocoJul. The series is scheduled to premier...

item.title: Fani-Kayode Appointed Nigeria’s Ambassador to Germany, Thanks President Tinubu
item.description: Nigeria don officially post Femi Fani-Kayode go Germany as Ambassador and he don express im gratitude to President Bola Ahmed Tinubu for the honour. This appointment na part of larger move wey Tinubu ...

item.title: SASSA Reminds Beneficiaries to Attend Grant Review Appointments or Risk Suspension
item.description: The South African Social Security Agency (SASSA) is reminding social grant beneficiaries to respond promptly to the 30-day notices requiring them to visit agency offices for grant reviews. The agency ...

item.title: Delta Governor Redeploys Commissioners Over Alleged IPP Fund Diversion And Illegal Levies In Ministries
item.description: Governor Sheriff Oborevwori of Delta State don carry out sudden redeployment for him cabinet last month, affecting two commissioners and some deputy directors for Ministry of Energy. The matter be say...

item.title: News Article Currently Inaccessible Due to Server Restrictions
item.description: We attempted to access the news article from NDTV regarding school assembly news headlines for March 8, covering top national, world, sports, and business news. However, the server has denied access a...

item.title: Dia Mate Impresses with Her Rendition of Camila Cabello Song on YFSF 2026
item.description: In Week 12 of 'Your Face Sounds Familiar' (YFSF) 2026, performer Dia Mate delivered a standout performance by interpreting a classic song originally by Camila Cabello. Her rendition captured both the ...

item.title: Nenu Ready Film Team Engages Students During KL University Cultural Festival
item.description: The team of the upcoming Telugu film 'Nenu Ready', featuring Koneru Havish in the lead role, visited KL University in Vaddeswaram on Saturday as part of their promotional activities. During the event,...

item.title: Ducks Rally to Defeat Canadiens 6-5 in Shootout After Kreider Ties the Game
item.description: In a thrilling NHL matchup, the Anaheim Ducks staged a remarkable comeback to defeat the Montreal Canadiens 6-5 in a shootout. The turning point came when Montreal's Kreider scored a crucial goal to t...

item.title: Ogun Town Planner Killed During Enforcement Operation After Clash With Soldiers
item.description: For one tragic day for Ogun State, one ad-hoc staff member, Oluwaseyi Adeoye, lost him life as soldiers opened fire during a building regulation enforcement at Ganic Company, Orile-Imo along the Sagam...
